productDisplayName: John Miller Men Check Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white checked shirt made of a cotton/polyester blend, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding on the right cuff and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Hand or machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Designed for the ambitious executive in flattering shades and crafted from cotton/polyester blended fabric, this checked formal shirt from the john miller collection, is stitched to perfection. Pair it with crisp formal pants, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
